title: hieracium juelii
intro: Hieracium juelii is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family that is commonly found in the mountainous regions of northern Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Hieracium juelii is typically used as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it can also be consumed raw in salads or as a food supplement.
